title: Citrusy Crumbly Ukrainian Scotch Bonnet Pilaf
description: A flavorful and energizing Ukrainian-inspired dish featuring scotch bonnet peppers, citrus, and crumbly texture, perfect for a lunch or dinner meal. This recipe is gluten-free-friendly, making it accessible to a wide range of diets.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add diced scotch bonnet peppers and cook for 2-3 minutes, until slightly softened.
In a large bowl, combine cauliflower rice, gluten-free chicken broth, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper. Mix well.
Add the cooked onion and scotch bonnet mixture to the bowl and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with grated orange zest.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, until the top is lightly browned and the pilaf is heated through.
Remove from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
